meaning: v.漫游,流浪,转来转去,纺成粗纱n.漫游,流浪,粗纱
examples: They were daring blue-water adventurers who used basic canoes to rove across the ocean.
Karl Rove, Mr Bush's strategist, is a "villain."
He loved to rove the green hills and clear waters.
It is hard to understate the consequences of Mr Rove being distracted from his job.
To make matters worse, Mr Rove is more important now than in the past.
